ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number in the draft */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the player's current contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "shootout" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game was decided by a shootout */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arena where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_arena_id FOREIGN KEY ("arena_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus goals scored for or against */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits delivered by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of shots blocked by the player */,
  "penalties_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes served by the player */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won by the player */,
  "faceoffs_lost" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost by the player */,
  "time_on_ice" REAL /* Total time on ice in minutes */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored on the power play */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored while shorthanded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injured player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "recovery_days" INTEGER /* Estimated number of days for recovery */,
  "injured_body_part" TEXT /* Specific body part injured (e.g., knee, shoulder) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "predicted_goals" REAL /* Predicted number of goals scored */,
  "predicted_assists" REAL /* Predicted number of assists */,
  "predicted_plus_minus" REAL /* Predicted plus-minus goals scored for or against */,
  "predicted_injury_risk" REAL /* Predicted injury risk */,
  "predicted_hits" REAL /* Predicted number of hits delivered */,
  "predicted_blocks" REAL /* Predicted number of shots blocked */,
  "predicted_penalties_minutes" REAL /* Predicted penalty minutes */,
  "predicted_faceoffs_won" REAL /* Predicted number of faceoffs won */,
  "predicted_faceoffs_lost" REAL /* Predicted number of faceoffs lost */,
  "predicted_time_on_ice" REAL /* Predicted time on ice in minutes */,
  "predicted_power_play_goals" REAL /* Predicted number of power play goals */,
  "predicted_short_handed_goals" REAL /* Predicted number of shorthanded goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the fantasy team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the fantasy team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the fantasy team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the fantasy team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties by the fantasy team */,
  "playoff_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is in the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_team_players" (
  "fantasy_team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player in a fantasy team */,
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fantasy team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "fantasy_position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the fantasy team (e.g., C, LW, RW) */,
  "fantasy_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the fantasy league */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the player was acquired for the fantasy team */,
  "acquisition_type" TEXT /* Type of acquisition (e.g., draft, trade, free agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_team_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_players_fantasy_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("fantasy_team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("fantasy_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, fantasy sports enthusiast) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's preferred timezone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Detailed action taken (e.g., viewed player stats, downloaded game data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
